content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:SWTOR.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' [[Star Wars video games|MMORPG]] debuted on [[December 20]], 2011.]]
A list of events in '''2011''' related to ''[[Star Wars]]''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] ‐ [[Watch out for the Wookiee!]] released.
*[[January 7|07]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|''The Clone Wars'']]: "[[Nightsisters (episode)|Nightsisters]]" aired.
*[[January 12|12]] – [[Knight Errant: Aflame 4|''Knight Errant: Aflame'' 4]] released.
*[[January 13|13]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.16|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.16]] published.
*[[January 14|14]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Monster]]" aired.
*[[January 19|19]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: A Long Time Ago.... Volume 3]]'' released.
*[[January 21|21]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Witches of the Mist]]" aired.
*[[January 25|25]] – [[Knight Errant (novel)|''Knight Errant'' novel]] released.
*25 – [[Star Wars Insider 123|''Star Wars Insider'' 123]] published.
*[[January 26|26]] – [[Darth Vader and the Lost Command 1|''Darth Vader and the Lost Command'' 1]] released.
*26 – [[Legacy—War 2|''Legacy—War'' 2]] released.
*[[January 28|28]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Overlords]]" aired.

==February==
*[[February 4|04]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Altar of Mortis (episode)|Altar of Mortis]]" aired.
*[[February 9|09]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Volume 1: Blood of the Empire]]'' released.
*[[February 10|10]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.17|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.17]] published.
*[[February 11|11]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Ghosts of Mortis]]" aired.
*11 – ''[[Timeline 12: The Great Hyperspace War]]'' released on on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[February 16|16]] – [[Knight Errant: Aflame 5|''Knight Errant: Aflame'' 5]] released.
*[[February 18|18]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[The Citadel]]" aired.
*[[February 21|21]] – ''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Sentinel]]'' released.
*21 – ''[[Star Wars: Mysteries of the Jedi]]'' published.
*[[February 22|22]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Backlash]]'' paperback released.
*[[February 23|23]] – [[Darth Vader and the Lost Command 2|''Darth Vader and the Lost Command'' 2]] released.
*23 – [[Legacy—War 3|''Legacy—War'' 3]] released.
*23 – [[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 59|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 59]] released.
*23 – [[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 60|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 60]] released.
*[[February 26|26]] – [[Wikipedia:Nintendo 3DS|Nintendo 3DS]] is launched.

==March==
*[[March 3|03]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Secret Missions 3: Duel at Shattered Rock]]'' released.
*[[March 4|04]] – "[[Counterattack]]" aired on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[March 9|09]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: At War with the Empire Volume 1]]'' released.
*[[March 10|10]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.18|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.18]] published.
*[[March 11|11]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Citadel Rescue]]" aired.
*[[March 15|15]] – Major update of the ''[[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion]]''.
*15 – [[Star Wars Insider 124|''Star Wars Insider'' 124]] released.
*[[March 19|19]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Padawan Lost]]" aired in the UK.
*[[March 22|22]] – ''[[The Old Republic: Deceived]]'' released.
*22 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars III: The Clone Wars]]'' released.
*[[March 26|26]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Wookiee Hunt]]" aired in the UK.
*[[March 29|29]] – ''[[The Star Wars Craft Book]]'' released.
*[[March 30|30]] – [[Darth Vader and the Lost Command 3|''Darth Vader and the Lost Command'' 3]] released.
*30 – [[Legacy—War 4|''Legacy—War'' 4]] released.
*30 – [[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 61|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 61]] released.
*30 – [[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 62|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 62]] released.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Padawan Lost]]" and "[[Wookiee Hunt]]" aired in the US.
*[[April 7|07]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.19|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.19]] published.
*[[April 13|13]] – ''[[Star Wars: Invasion Volume 2—Rescues]]'' released.
*[[April 14|14]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: A Jedi Adventure in 3-D]]'' released.
*[[April 18|18]] – ''[[Ultimate Sticker Collection: Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Secrets of the Force]]'' released.
*18 – ''[[Star Wars: Battles for the Galaxy]]'' released.
*[[April 26|26]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Allies]]'' paperback released.
*26 – [[Star Wars Insider 125|''Star Wars Insider'' 125]] published.
*[[April 27|27]] – [[Darth Vader and the Lost Command 4|''Darth Vader and the Lost Command'' 4]] released.
*27 – [[Legacy—War 5|''Legacy—War'' 5]] released.
*27 – [[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 63|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 63]] released.
*27 – [[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 64|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 64]] released.
*[[April 29|29]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Valsedian Operation]]'' webcomic concludes.
*?? – ''[[The Third Time Pays for All]]'' published in Dark Horse Presents #1.

==May==
*[[May 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars: Head-to-Head Tag Teams]]'' released.
*[[May 3|03]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.20|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.20]] published.
*[[May 7|07]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Opress Unleashed]]'' released for [[Free Comic Book Day]].
*[[May 11|11]] – ''[[Star Wars Adventures: Boba Fett and the Ship of Fear]]'' released.
*[[May 18|18]] – [[Star Wars: Blood Ties: A Tale of Jango and Boba Fett (TPB)|''Star Wars: Blood Ties: A Tale of Jango and Boba Fett'']] released.
*18 – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Volume 2: Threat of Peace]]'' released in the US.
*18 – [[Jedi—The Dark Side 1|''Jedi—The Dark Side'' 1]] released.
*[[May 20|20]] – ''[[Star Tours: The Adventures Continue]]'' opens at [[Disney's Hollywood Studios]].
*20-[[May 22|22]] – The twelfth [[Star Wars Weekends|''Star Wars'' Weekends]] event begins at Disney's Hollywood Studios.
*[[May 24|24]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Conviction]]'' released.
*24 – ''[[The Old Republic: Fatal Alliance]]'' paperback released.
*[[May 25|25]] – [[Legacy—War 6|''Legacy—War'' 6]] released.
*25 – [[Darth Vader and the Lost Command 5|''Darth Vader and the Lost Command'' 5]] released.
*[[May 27|27]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Volume 2: Threat of Peace]]'' released in the UK.
*27-[[May 29|29]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney's Hollywood Studios.

==June==
*[[June 2|02]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.21|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.21]] published.
*02 – [[Lee J. Ames]] dies.
*[[June 3|03]] – ''[[Star Tours: The Adventures Continue]]'' opened at [[Disneyland]].
*03-[[June 5|05]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney's Hollywood Studios.
*[[June 6|06]] – [[Return (cinematic trailer)|''Return'']] trailer released.
*[[June 8|08]] – [[The Old Republic—The Lost Suns 1|''The Old Republic—The Lost Suns'' 1]] released.
*[[June 10|10]]-[[June 12|12]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney's Hollywood Studios.
*[[June 14|14]] – [[Star Wars Insider 126|''Star Wars Insider'' 126]] published.
*[[June 20|20]] – ''[[Star Wars Character Encyclopedia]]'' released.
*[[June 22|22]] – [[Jedi—The Dark Side 2|''Jedi—The Dark Side'' 2]] released.
*[[June 23|23]]– [[Gene Colan]] dies.
*[[June 30|30]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.22|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.22]] published.

==July==
*[[July 13|13]] – [[Invasion: Revelations 1|''Invasion: Revelations'' 1]] released.
*13 – [[Star Wars: Knight Errant Volume 1: Aflame|''Star Wars: Knight Errant: Aflame'' trade paperback]] released.
*[[July 19|19]] – ''[[Choices of One]]'' released.
*19 – ''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Pantheon]]'' released.
*[[July 20|20]] – [[Jedi—The Dark Side 3|''Jedi—The Dark Side'' 3]] released.
*20 – [[The Old Republic—The Lost Suns 2|''The Old Republic—The Lost Suns'' 2]] released.
*[[July 21|21]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' available for pre-order.
*[[July 22|22]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Padawan Menace]]'' aired on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[July 27|27]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Starcrusher Trap]]'' released.
*[[July 28|28]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.23|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.23]] published.

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Day-at-a-Time Calendar 2012|''Star Wars'' Day-at-a-Time Calendar 2012]] published.
*[[August 3|03]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness]]'' begins with its [[Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness 1|first issue]].
*[[August 9|09]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Ascension]]'' released.
*[[August 10|10]] – [[Invasion: Revelations 2|''Invasion: Revelations'' 2]] released.
*10 – [[The Old Republic—The Lost Suns 3|''The Old Republic—The Lost Suns'' 3]] released.
*[[August 15|15]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Incredible Vehicles]]'' released.
*[[August 17|17]] – [[Knight Errant: Deluge 1|''Knight Errant: Deluge'' 1]] released.
*17 – [[Star Wars Insider 127|''Star Wars Insider'' 127]] published.
*[[August 22|22]] – [[Studio Colorido]] founded.
*22 – [[Trigger, Inc.]] founded.
*[[August 24|24]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: A Long Time Ago.... Volume 4]]'' released.
*24 – [[Jedi—The Dark Side 4|''Jedi—The Dark Side'' 4]] released.
*[[August 25|25]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.24|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.24]] published.
*[[August 30|30]] – [[The Force Unleashed II (novel)|''The Force Unleashed II'']] paperback released.
*[[August 31|31]] – ''[[Star Wars Adventures: Chewbacca and the Slavers of the Shadowlands]]'' released.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – [[Star Wars: The Complete Saga (book)|''Star Wars: The Complete Saga'']] released.
*[[September 6|06]] – [[Heir to the Empire|''Heir to the Empire: The 20th Anniversary Edition'']] released featuring the new novella ''[[Crisis of Faith]]''.
*[[September 7|07]] – [[Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness 2|''Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness'' 2]] released.
*[[September 13|13]] – A massive overhaul of [[StarWars.com]] occurs. The [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] exclusive online members club is discontinued.
*13 – [[Star Wars Insider 128|''Star Wars Insider'' 128]] published.
*[[September 14|14]] – [[Invasion: Revelations 3|''Invasion: Revelations'' 3]] released.
*14 – [[The Old Republic—The Lost Suns 4|''The Old Republic—The Lost Suns'' 4]] released.
*[[September 16|16]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Complete Saga]]'' released.
*16 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Padawan Menace]]'' released on Blu-ray and DVD.
*16 – The [[The Clone Wars: Season Four|fourth season]] of ''The Clone Wars'' began with episodes "[[Water War]]" and "[[Gungan Attack]]."
*[[September 17|17]] – [[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path'']] trade edition released.
*[[September 21|21]] – [[Jedi—The Dark Side 5|''Jedi—The Dark Side'' 5]] released.
*21 – [[Knight Errant: Deluge 2|''Knight Errant: Deluge'' 2]] released.
*21 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: The Complete Saga]]'' released.
*[[September 22|22]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.25|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.25]] published.
*[[September 23|23]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Prisoners]]" aired.
*[[September 29|29]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures: The Official Guide to the Virtual World]]'' released.
*[[September 30|30]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Shadow Warrior]]" aired.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader: A 3-D Reconstruction Log]]'' released.
*[[October 3|03]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars Character Encyclopedia]]'' released.
*[[October 7|07]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Mercy Mission (episode)|Mercy Mission]]" aired.
*[[October 12|12]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Strange Allies]]'' released.
*12 – [[Invasion: Revelations 4|''Invasion: Revelations'' 4]] released.
*12 – [[The Old Republic—The Lost Suns 5|''The Old Republic—The Lost Suns'' 5]] released.
*[[October 14|14]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Nomad Droids]]" aired.
*[[October 15|15]] – [[Grant Feely]] is born.
*15 – ''[[Star Wars: The Blueprints]]'' released.
*[[October 18|18]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars The Complete Season Three|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' The Complete Season Three]] released.
*[[October 19|19]] – [[Knight Errant: Deluge 3|''Knight Errant: Deluge'' 3]] released.
*[[October 20|20]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.26|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.26]] published.
*[[October 25|25]] – [[Riptide (novel)|''Riptide'']] released.
*25 – [[Star Wars Insider 129|''Star Wars Insider'' 129]] published.
*[[October 26|26]] – [[Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 1|''Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost'' 1]] released.
*26 – ''[[Star Wars: The Complete Vader]]'' released in the US.
*[[October 28|28]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Darkness on Umbara]]" aired.

==November==
*[[November 3|03]] – The ''[[Millennium Falcon Owner's Workshop Manual]]'' released in the UK.
*[[November 4|04]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[The General (episode)|The General]]" aired.
*[[November 8|08]] – [[Star Wars Insider Special Edition 2012|''Star Wars Insider'' Special Edition 2012]] released in '''US'''.
*[[November 10|10]] – ''Star Wars Insider'' Special Edition 2012 released in '''UK'''.
*[[November 11|11]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Plan of Dissent]]" aired.
*[[November 15|15]] – ''[[The Old Republic: Revan]]'' released.
*[[November 16|16]] – [[Invasion: Revelations 5|''Invasion: Revelations'' 5]] released.
*16 – [[Knight Errant: Deluge 4|''Knight Errant: Deluge'' 4]] released.
*[[November 17|17]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.27|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.27]] published.
*[[November 18|18]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Carnage of Krell]]" aired.
*18 – ''[[Minecraft]]'' released.
*[[November 23|23]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: At War with the Empire Volume 2]]'' released.
*[[November 25|25]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Kidnapped]]" aired.
*[[November 29|29]] – ''[[Shadow Games]]'' released.
*[[November 30|30]] – [[Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 2|''Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost'' 2]] released.
*30 – [[Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness 3|''Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness'' 3]] released.

==December==
*[[December 2|02]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Slaves of the Republic]]" aired.
*[[December 13|13]] – The short story ''[[The Tenebrous Way]]'' published in [[Star Wars Insider 130|''Star Wars Insider'' 130]].
*13 – Early access to ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' began.
*[[December 14|14]] – [[Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse 1|''Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse'' 1]] released.
*[[December 15|15]] – ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' servers shut down.
*15 – [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (video game)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']] releases its [[Battle of Umbara/Legends|Battle of Umbara]] expansion.
*15 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.28|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.28]] published.
*15 – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''{{'s}} first day of early access was originally scheduled. This date was later changed to December 13th.
*[[December 20|20]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' released in North America and Europe.
*20 – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Explorer's Guide]]'' released.
*20 – ''[[The Journal of Master Gnost-Dural (real-life book)|The Journal of Master Gnost-Dural]]'' released.
*[[December 21|21]] – [[Knight Errant: Deluge 5|''Knight Errant: Deluge'' 5]] released.
*[[December 27|27]] – ''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]'' new paperback edition released along with a new short story by [[James Luceno]] featured inside.
*[[December 28|28]] – [[Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 3|''Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost'' 3]] released.
